name: ASUS PRO WS W680-ACE ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-4800 ECC - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - VGA - Dual Intel 2.5Gb LAN - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C Header
shortName: ASUS PRO WS W680-ACE ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 2x PCIe 5.0
description: Workstation-class ATX motherboard with LGA 1700 socket, ECC memory support, and dual 2.5Gb networking.
